source_contract: The article explicitly declares Figshare accession 7314731, whose API manifest and workbook headers were recovered. The plots_Puflatsch sheet has individual morph, flower-count, capsule, seed-viability, fitness, and herbivory fields. Pollinator recordings are separate 2016/2017 image archives, so no A_to_pollination effect is registered until the predeclared annotation protocol verifies morph-specific target exposure, frame interval, and camera-to-morph mapping. Fruit and seed outcomes are not substituted for visitation.
